title: Circular Letter- Prudential Submission Platform
text:
TTSEC-EXEC-24888-CH-29/12/2025
December 29, 2025
CIRCULAR LETTER ISSUED TO:
BROKER-DEALERS, INVESTMENT ADVISERS AND UNDERWRITERS
REGISTERED UNDER THE SECURITIES ACT, CHAP 83:02 OF THE LAWS OF THE
REPUBLIC OF TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO
Trinidad and Tobago Securities and Exchange Commission Prudential Submission
Platform
As the Trinidad and Tobago Securities and Exchange Commission (“the Commission”) continues
to strengthen its macroprudential oversight and its capabilities to provide stakeholders with timely
and accurate data on the securities market of Trinidad and Tobago. We are pleased to announce
the deployment of our new online Prudential Submission Platform.
This platform has been designed to streamline the collection, validation, consolidation, and storage
of all Micro and Macro Prudential Reporting Framework (“MMRF”) data. It will also modernize
and automate the current manual MMRF process, supporting greater operational efficiency and
enhanced data-driven decision-making.
Key features of the new solution include:
• Real-time data accuracy and completeness checks at the point of entry.
• An embedded online validation process with immediate error notifications.
• An enhanced user experience through real-time feedback, automated reminders, and instant
alerts for submission anomalies.
Once implemented, future phases of the platform will include capabilities for stakeholders to auto-
generate visual reports and indicators for improved analytics and monitoring.
The new platform will be a web-based application accessible via the Commission’s corporate
website and is scheduled to be introduced to the market in February 2026 to support the
submission of Q4 2025 (October to December 2025) MMRF Reports.
Trinidad and Tobago Securities and Exchange Commission
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
LEVELS 22-23, TOWER D, INTERNATIONAL WATERFRONT CENTRE,
1 WRIGHTSON ROAD, PORT OF SPAIN, TRINIDAD, W.I.
Tel: (868) 223-2991 | Email: ttsec@ttsec.org.tt | Website: www.ttsec.org.tt

TTSEC-EXEC-24888-CH-29/12/2025
December 29, 2025
Circular Letter
Page 2
In our efforts to ensure a smooth transition, one-on-one training sessions with all registrants will
be scheduled between February 2nd – 13th, 2026 to ensure the MMRF Q4 2025 submissions are
uploaded via the new platform. All registrants are expected to have their MMRF quarterly
submissions prepared by January 31st, 2026.
During these sessions the MMRF team will provide hands-on guidance on navigating and using
the new platform effectively.
We thank you for your continued support and look forward to improving the reporting experience
through this initiative.
Sincerely,
_____________________
Mr. Kester Guy
Chief Executive Officer
Trinidad and Tobago Securities and Exchange Commission
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
LEVELS 22-23, TOWER D, INTERNATIONAL WATERFRONT CENTRE,
